mapper.select: SELECT perm.id, perm.user_id, usr.username, usr.real_name, perm.skill_id, sk.skill_name, perm.can_view, perm.can_use, perm.can_train, perm.can_publish, perm.status, perm.grant_time FROM ai_user_skill_permission perm INNER JOIN sys_user usr ON usr.id = perm.user_id AND usr.is_deleted = FALSE INNER JOIN ai_skill sk ON sk.id = perm.skill_id AND sk.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE perm.user_id = #{userId} AND perm.status = 1 ORDER BY perm.grant_time DESC, perm.id DESC
SELECT id, user_id, skill_id, can_view, can_use, can_train, can_publish, status, grant_time, grant_user FROM ai_user_skill_permission WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND skill_id=#{skillId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_user_skill_permission (user_id, skill_id, can_view, can_use, can_train, can_publish, status, grant_time, grant_user) VALUES (#{userId}, #{skillId}, #{canView}, #{canUse}, #{canTrain}, #{canPublish}, #{status}, #{grantTime}, #{grantUser})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_user_skill_permission SET can_view=#{canView}, can_use=#{canUse}, can_train=#{canTrain}, can_publish=#{canPublish}, status=#{status}, grant_time=#{grantTime}, grant_user=#{grantUser} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_user_skill_permission WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND skill_id=#{skillId} AND status=1 AND can_view=TRUE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_user_skill_permission WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND skill_id=#{skillId} AND status=1 AND can_use=TRUE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_user_skill_permission WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND skill_id=#{skillId} AND status=1 AND can_train=TRUE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_user_skill_permission WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND skill_id=#{skillId} AND status=1 AND can_publish=TRUE
